---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the use case in plain language. What are you trying to do that Brownstone doesn't currently let you do?

## What would the solution look like?

A rough idea of how this could work — UI, API, new tool, config option, etc. Doesn't have to be a complete design.

## Alternatives you've considered

If you've thought about doing this a different way, what didn't fit?

## Anything else

Links, screenshots, references to similar features in other tools.
